text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 10 

ANES_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Anesthesia Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for anesthesia services (ANES) by a primary payer other 
than Medicare for a given year. ANES claims are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the 
Part B carrier data file. 

ANES claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code
